temporal_description:
(00:00-00:09) In a dimly lit, green-tinted room, a man with white hair, wearing a grey suit, stands with a serious expression. He is flanked by two younger men. He holds a small, yellow and black object, possibly a lighter or a small device, and gestures with it while speaking. The man on his right looks down at his phone, while the man on his left stares forward intently. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation or discussion. The man in the suit appears to be giving instructions or making a point, establishing his authority over the others.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, rhythmic beat begins to play, heightening the suspense.)
(00:10-00:13) The man in the grey suit continues to speak, his expression remaining stern and focused. He gestures with his hand, emphasizing his words as he gives a final instruction before the scene cuts. (Storyline: The tension builds as the man in the suit gives a final, decisive command, signaling the start of an action.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Decisive, firm. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, rhythmic music continues.)
